executives.name: Armando Pimentel, Jr.
executives.background: Mr. Pimentel is President and Chief Executive Officer of Florida Power & Light Company. He previously served as president and CEO of NextEra Energy Resources and as CFO of NextEra Energy.

executives.name: Christopher Williams
executives.background: Chairman of Siebert Williams Shank & Co., LLC.
